prompt: I want to create a SaaS product landing page, show me 3 style directions for comparison
expected: Trigger clarifying questions to ask about design context/brand; produce 3 variations on design_canvas; avoid purple gradients/emoji/Inter and other AI slop; provide specific rationale explaining each variation's differentiating dimensions
tests: workflow asking questions + variations logic + anti-AI slop checklist + design_canvas usage

prompt: Help me create a 10-page product pitch deck about an AI tool startup project
expected: Start with deck_stage.js; first verbally vocalize the design system (colors/typography/layout rhythm) and wait for confirmation; alternate between Section divider/content/data/quote layouts; font size >= 24px; 1-indexed labels
tests: Junior Designer reports first then builds + deck_stage usage + visual rhythm + scale standards

prompt: Create a 30-second HTML animation explaining how neural networks work
expected: Use animations.jsx Stage+Sprite; write timeline first then components; easeIn on enter, easeOut on exit; tell story in phases instead of stacking animations; text stays >= 3 seconds
tests: animations workflow + correct easing + rhythm design + duration control

prompt: Create a Habit Tracker App prototype
expected: Ask user for overview tiling or flow demo (default to overview); use assets/ios_frame.jsx, don't hand-write Dynamic Island; Tracker belongs to high-density type, each screen should have >= 3 information density elements (habit completion rate, streak days, trend chart, achievement badge, etc., non-decorative); at least 5-7 screens side by side (home/new habit/details/stats/settings)
tests: overview/flow form routing + ios_frame hard binding + information density typing (high-density) + multi-screen layout

prompt: Create a reading notes App prototype
expected: Mainly overview tiling; ios_frame.jsx; reading notes is content-display oriented, info density requirements less extreme than Tracker, but note list page still needs >= 3 layers of info (books, quotes, tags, progress); at least 4-6 screens (home bookshelf/note details/annotations/search/notebook management); font priority serif display
tests: overview default + ios_frame + information hierarchy + content-driven visual rhythm

prompt: Create a running tracker App prototype
expected: Overview tiling; ios_frame.jsx; running App is high-density type (map, pace curve, heart rate zones, per-km split data), each screen has >= 3 product differentiating info items; at least 5 screens (today overview/live running data/route map/history/monthly stats); avoid AI slop (no purple gradients, no decorative icon clutter, but data visualization icons are allowed)
tests: overview + ios_frame + high-density data visualization + map/chart mixing + slop boundary conditions
